titleStmt.title: Letter from Edward O'Farrell to M.C. Macinerney, 26 June 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Edward O'Farrell

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Edward O'Frarrell to Mr. M.C. Macinerney, Divisional Justice of the Dublin Metropolitan Police District. The letter acknowledges the receipt of correspondence indicating Mr Macinerney's illness and indicates approval of such leave. It also confirms the temporary appointment of Mr. Richard J. Kelly to deputise in his absence.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, NAI-CSO-RP-1916-5618-10827-1

correspAction.placeName: Bella Vista, Kingstown, County Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
26th June, 1916 Sir, I am directed by the Lorde Justices to acknowledge the
receipt of your letter of the 25th instant, accompanied by
a Medical Certificate, for five days sick leave, and I am
to convey Their Excellencies' approval of such leave, and
of the appointment of Mr. Richard J. Kelly K.C. to act as
your Deputy during the leave sanctioned at such remuneration
as may be subsequently fixed in communication with the
Lords Commissioners of His Majesty's Treasury I am,
Sir,
Your obedient Servant, E O'Farrell M.C. Macinerney, Esq., K.C., Belle Vista, Kingstown, Co. Dublin. I Write as above
II Inform ChiefMagistrate
III do. Mr R.J. Kelly K.C.
IV Note
V J.D.
As Â£ Sanction
E.oF. 26-11-16
